Jing Li
About Me
Hello, I'm Jing

I translate ideas on paper into reality, blending creativity and design with analytical strategy.

Currently I’m a master’s student at Peking University in management, with a strong analytical foundation and quantitative research in marketing+ branding strategy. My other educational background is centered around illustration and human-centric visual design. Professionally, I have 4+ years experience in operations, project management, client experience and brand marketing across luxury retail and startup environments.

Here’s what I bring

- Excellent skills project and operations management

- Process implementation and maintenance

- Customer-focused + Data-driven strategy

- Communication & Transparency (timelines, ownership, deliverables)

- Design process facilitation (reviews, workshops, retrospectives)

- Cross-functional/cultural + international coordination
